modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Not authorized error when trying to register for classes

full_description_text:  
I can't log in to self-service registration.  
It says my student ID isn't authorized to view the record.  
Also, there's an internal server error message.  
Super frustrating!
